summary: Plan-mode classification only. #87322 remains the best live canonical for the Mattermost block-streaming message-loss root cause. #71569 is related but not a duplicate because it includes distinct config-schema/documentation and notification UX scope beyond the single-post block-streaming overwrite tracked by #87322.

actions.reason: #87322 is open, hydrated, non-security-sensitive, and is the representative issue for the specific Mattermost block-streaming overwrite/message-loss root cause.
#71569 is in the same Mattermost streaming family as #87322, but it has distinct config and notification UX scope, so it should not be closed as a duplicate of #87322.
